title: Project Structure & Workflow Refactoring
objective: Refactor project structure, naming, and config system to professionally manage multi-workflow training with different model settings and easily compare results
evidence: Initial scaffold created; critical documents still require Plannotator gate approval.

detail: All 4 critical documents (brief.md, plan.md, blockers.md, verification.md, goal-prompt.md) approved via Plannotator gates. Plan covers 9 slices across the full pipeline: workflow docs, config/presets, dataset technique-restructure, run ID tracking, export/eval restructure, evaluation pipeline, frontend, subject schema, migration & cleanup.
